description: Style Note Look cool and stylish while you exercise in these shorts from nike. Wear them with a colourful tee and sports shoes for a fuss-free outfit which won't get in your way. The Dri-Fit fabric will wick away sweat and help you stay cool when things heat up! Also perfect for those armchair Sports fans who want something comfy to wear while lounging around at home. Product Details Regular fit black shorts with an elasticated waistband with inner draw cord, insert pockets at sides and contrast stripes for decoration Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on decorations
